allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -U postgres -d ibanez_db -c "SELECT DISTINCT body_type FROM guitars WHERE body_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY body_type;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -U postgres -d ibanez_db -c "SELECT count\(*\) FROM guitars;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -U postgres -d ibanez_db -c "SELECT DISTINCT body_material FROM guitars WHERE body_material IS NOT NULL AND length\(body_material\) < 100 ORDER BY body_material;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -U postgres -d ibanez_db -c "SELECT DISTINCT raw_attributes->>''Number of strings'' as strings FROM guitars WHERE raw_attributes->>''Number of strings'' IS NOT NULL ORDER BY strings;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -U postgres -d ibanez_db -c "SELECT DISTINCT jsonb_object_keys\(raw_attributes\) as key FROM guitars ORDER BY key;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -U postgres -d ibanez_db -c "SELECT body_material, count\(*\) FROM guitars WHERE body_material IS NOT NULL AND body_material NOT LIKE ''Body type:%'' AND length\(body_material\) < 200 GROUP BY body_material ORDER BY count\(*\) DESC LIMIT 80;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -U postgres -d ibanez_db -c "SELECT DISTINCT substring\(body_material from ''Body material:\([^ ]+[a-zA-Z ]*?\)\(?:Neck|Bridge|$\)''\) as material FROM guitars WHERE body_material LIKE ''Body type:%'' ORDER BY material;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -U postgres -d ibanez_db -c "SELECT raw_attributes->>''Number of strings'' as nos, count\(*\) FROM guitars WHERE raw_attributes ? ''Number of strings'' GROUP BY nos ORDER BY count\(*\) DESC;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -U postgres -d ibanez_db -c "SELECT key, count\(*\) FROM \(SELECT jsonb_object_keys\(raw_attributes\) as key FROM guitars\) sub WHERE key ~ ''^[A-Za-z]'' AND key !~ ''^[A-Z]{2,}'' AND length\(key\) > 3 GROUP BY key ORDER BY count\(*\) DESC LIMIT 40;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -U postgres -d ibanez_db -c "SELECT key, count\(*\) FROM \(SELECT jsonb_object_keys\(raw_attributes\) as key FROM guitars\) sub WHERE key ~ ''^[A-Za-z]'' AND length\(key\) > 5 GROUP BY key ORDER BY count\(*\) DESC LIMIT 50;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=password psql -h localhost -U postgres -d ibanez_db -c "SELECT raw_attributes->>''Factory tuning'' as ft, count\(*\) FROM guitars WHERE raw_attributes->>''Factory tuning'' IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ft ORDER BY count\(*\) DESC LIMIT 20;")
